title: The 8 Best Herbal Remedies for Jet Lag Recovery
description: Withania somnifera, also known as ashwagandha, is an herb that helps with jet lag. When you travel across time zones, your body gets confused about sleep and wake times. Ashwagandha tincture works by reducing stress and anxiety, which can be caused by traveling. It also helps regulate your sleep-wake cycle and promotes relaxation. The tincture contains adaptogenic properties that help your body adjust to the new time zone faster. This herb has been used in traditional Indian medicine f...
